ogTitle: Tanja vs Tannas Mount: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tanja and Tannas Mount.
heading: Tanja vs Tannas Mount — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tanja, New South Wales and Tannas Mount, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tannas Mount has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Tanja (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tanja or Tannas Mount safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tanja has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Tannas Mount scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tanja scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Tannas Mount scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tanja or Tannas Mount?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tannas Mount has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
